sections.paragraph:
Original: מטּרה מטּרא

Transliteration: maṭṭârâ' maṭṭârâh

Phonetic: mat-taw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. guard, ward, prison, mark, target
    1. guard, ward, prison
    2. target, mark (figuratively of chastisement)

Origin: from H5201

TWOT entry: 1356a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
